description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 43 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 4 mins. His activity was split mostly across Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed in the provided data.
